model.current_strength_score_formula: 0.40 normalized PELE + 0.34 normalized World Football Elo + 0.26 normalized FIFA ranking points
model.attack_proxy_formula: 0.42 current strength + 0.32 normalized PELE offense GF + 0.14 historical goals-for score + 0.12 historical failed-to-score inverse score
model.defense_proxy_formula: 0.42 current strength + 0.32 normalized inverse PELE defense GA + 0.14 historical goals-against inverse score + 0.12 historical clean-sheet score
model.missing_value_rule: Do not invent PELE values. If a PELE numeric field is missing, leave it null and exclude it from that weighted blend.
limitations: No final squad, injury, suspension, or official fantasy input yet.
PELE ratings are model inputs, not official FIFA projections.
Proxy scores are 0-100 model signals, not calibrated probabilities.
